case_title: CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES VS. PACIFIC COAST CONSTRUCTION & DESIGN, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $518.69 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE JUL-22-2009, FILED BY PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL

NTC OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND INDEX OF FEDERAL AUTHORITIES, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL HEARING SET FOR JUL-08-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-08-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES' NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND INDEX OF FEDERAL AUTHORITIES IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL

PROOF OF SERVICE OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD; CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET; NTC OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD; ETC FILED BY PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL SERVED MAY-07-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO RESPONDENT PACIFIC COAST CONSTRUCTION & DESIGN, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT PACIFIC COAST CONSTRUCTION & DESIGN, INC. $45,425.74 PRINCIPAL, $2,521.25 ATTORNEY FEES, $518.69 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $48,465.68, (JUDGMENT FOR PETITIONER) SEE SCANNED DOC

MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES' Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Index Of Federal Authorities IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
